positive: A symmetrical, central composition featuring an intricately designed celestial fauna—a stylized phoenix or winged guardian figure—intertwined with blooming cosmic flora. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau and bioluminescent stained-glass etching, emphasizing clean, thick silhouettes and strong, graphic outlines. Use a limited, vibrant palette of deep midnight blue, emerald green, luminous gold, and amethyst purple. The composition must be highly detailed but maintain high contrast and readability when printed on fabric. Studio lighting, perfect symmetry, vector illustration, highly polished, centralized motif.
